home.title: Stay Ahead of Your Competitors with Smarter Applications

textSlider.text1: Shape the future of your organizations with artificial intelligence
textSlider.text2: Powerful, dynamic and team-friendly AI applications

socialMedia.title: Social Media Panels
socialMedia.description: Control all your accounts from one place, plan your posts, track your engagement. Spend your time growing your brand, not on reports. We've simplified the panel, you just be creative!

mobile.title: Mobile Applications
mobile.description: We enhance brands' digital power with our iOS and Android compatible solutions. We take user expectations one step further with personalized experience, robust infrastructure and modern design approach.

web.title: Web Applications
web.description: We make your brand stand out in the digital world with our SEO-friendly, fast and accessible infrastructure. We power your business growth with our scalable architecture and take your digital transformation one step further.

whyUs.title: Why Us?
whyUs.description: We approach every project as if it were our own business, producing simple and powerful solutions. We develop high-performance software from mobile applications to AI-supported systems. With our small but agile team, we offer fast, flexible and custom solutions and establish long-term business partnerships with post-delivery support.

card1.title: Software Developer
card1.description: We are looking for talented developers who want to work with Next.js, React and modern web technologies.

card2.title: Mobile Developer
card2.description: We are looking for experts to develop native and cross-platform applications on iOS and Android platforms.

card3.title: UI/UX Designer
card3.description: We are looking for designers who can create creative and modern designs that prioritize user experience.

card4.title: AI Specialist
card4.description: We are looking for specialists who want to work on AI and machine learning projects.

company.title: About Mithrabyte
company.subtitle: Grow your business with the power of technology

card1.title: Our Vision
card1.description: To lead the digital transformation of businesses with artificial intelligence and modern technologies, providing innovative solutions.

card2.title: Our Mission
card2.description: To become a partner in our customers' success and establish long-term business partnerships by offering them the best technology solutions.

card3.title: Our Values
card3.description: We work with the principles of innovation, customer focus, transparency and continuous learning.

card4.title: Our Team
card4.description: With our small but agile team, we offer fast decision-making, flexible work and high-quality solutions.
